title: carissa dalzellii
intro: Carissa dalzellii, also known as the Natal plum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is a thorny shrub that is native to the tropical regions of Africa. The medicinal properties of the plant are derived from its berries, leaves, and roots, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Carissa dalzellii include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health.
